reviews.review_description: I loved the 1st 4 days.... but after that.. it got boring..... do top hits from the 70s, 80s, 90s.... do rock ballads.... songs that people can relate n connect with
I'm 69 and I'm now feeling 10 years younger

I bought this game a few weeks ago and really enjoyed it until it crashed and will not load again I have tried resetting, boot reset etc and nothing works… tried to request a refund but as it has been over 14 days I cannot get a refund! Everytime I open the game I only get as far as the sup life screen before it freezes again! Waste of money! DO NOT BUY!
I have almost every fitness app on Meta and I love the boxing and flow. I rotate through them weekly and this app gives me a workout using different muscles which I appreciate.

This was the third game I bought for the meta quest 3 to try and exercise more and really enjoy it the only thing is I’ve been on the hardest levels now for quite a while so they need to do a update or a load of addons for different exercise routines now, stilla massive thumbs up from me as it’s a great workout👍🏻 ￼

A decent game… But way too easy hardly any challenge even in the so-called hell mode would be nice if there was more variables and more options speed, timing,￼ music, colour, floor h eight etc... also the whole bumping of the fist at the very beginning hardly ever works ..this could be a really good game, if they just had someone de￼sign it like they weren't sitting in a chair!...ps i was using wrist weights...still crazy easy and slow
worked well at first then started glitching, fazing through blocks and the screen goes black for 5 seconds in the middle on only one track. Uninstalled and reinstalled made it worse.

I am new to this app. So far I like it. I will probably try listening to Spotify while playing for a better music selection but the one thing that irks me at this time about this app. Is the punching gloves together to start.  If any developers read this please remove that. It is a pain in the butt to get them to do that the right way to start the game. Just let's us punch start or press a button please. It is bloody frustrating to be slamming your hands together in multiple ways for awhile until the game decides you are doing the gloves together thing after your 50th attempt and just trying to start the game.

reviews.review_title: Love the game but it crashes
reviews.review_description: I love this workout I hate that in the middle of the workout it crashes and you have to keep resetting it please fix this.. I feel like I wasted my 19.99

reviews.review_title: Love it! But I need faster targets...
reviews.review_description: I love playing and working out at the same time. The difficulty could be more challenging. I put 5lb weights on my wrists to increase difficulty but it would be nice if they had an option where I can turn the speed even faster. Maybe in the future it will be added (fingers crossed 🤞).

reviews.review_title: Targets are a bit too slow.
reviews.review_description: The items are going a little too slow....  I was able to hit them but, sometimes they do not reach me before a punch....  I don't know I'm new with this game.... Maybe problem in settings in which I don't know yet...

reviews.review_title: Doesn't  work at all!!!! Don't  buy this
reviews.review_description: Worked one time lol don't  buy this crap and the work is tailored  for a 3 year old
Good app but definitely needs some faster modes. When you compare it to something like powerbeats vr then it's way too sedate.

The workouts are fun, and the presentation is excellent, the only problem I have is the difficulty setting are not challenging/fast enough for you to get a really good workout compaired to Fit XR (boxing) and Les Mills Bodycombat.

I pay the app after trying the free version which I really enjoyed.
After using it twice it stop working! First time my hands were frozen so I decided to use the controllers but wasn’t working either. Turn off and on again multiple times but wouldn’t work.
Second time it won’t even open the game (internet connection was there, no problem with any other game), so I try multiple times but wouldn’t work.
Today again hands were frozen and controllers too.
I can’t request for a refund and I can’t find a way to signal the problem.
Well I paid 20 dollars for app that is half working. Leaderboard is not working, I can’t see any app development, all trainings are boring and song list is bad

I really like this app I use it every day I'm 55 and I've lost 10 lbs and will continue to use it. I do wish they would have different music for it. So until there's another app with different music I'll continue using it.
Game is great but Im not having issues it’s not wanting to always pick up my moves and I can’t see the leaderboard

reviews.review_title: Great fun esp for the price
reviews.review_description:
For the price I think this gives a range of workouts which are fun to use. 
I would like more music choices. Some of the songs drive me insane and I avoid the workouts.

After an update it's wiping my weekly progress. Went in and out of the app within 2/3mins and whilst it kept my time/calories burnt for the day it had reduced my 'weekly' target to zero. The rest of the week's ticks had also disappeared!?

I would also like to queue the workouts so I don't have to come out and start again. Havong said that for £14.99 I have been impressed with the range and feel it's a good workout especially if you work some leg/arm movements in e.g. leg lifts whilst doing a hook, marching on the spot when punching straight on

Its a great app, its enjoyable it works up a sweat. But the music is a bit boring and tge intensity needs to crank up and please add more workouts that combat body fat. This is good until I can afford a better app

reviews.review_title: AWESOME APP. HAVING FUN WHILE BURNING CA
reviews.review_description: ONLY ISSUE I HAVE IS HOW DO WE GET MORE MUSIC TO PLAY. I HAVE AN EAR WORM FROM THE SAME SONGS OVER AND OVER

Excellent fitness app, but message to developers.  Please add some more music choices. I tried to use Spotify to change it up but the beats don't match....and more exercise routines. For smaller 6 minute ones it's ok  but there are only two longer routines and frankly it's getting boring. Please change something. Some apps I've noticed with just one payment, no subscription, have up to 20 different tunes and more exercises. You need to do an update. Btw  the hand tracking is very hot and miss. I have to use the controllers, but that's ok.
You definitely get a good workout with this app. I enjoy it!

reviews.review_title: Does it live up to expectations
reviews.review_description: I have been using fitxr and now use Funfitland which his amazing . This i thought i would give a try.  its ok but mot brill i found even the hardest level wasn’t enough to get your heart rate up high . It’s quite slow and doesn’t keep you on your toes.

reviews.review_title: Best workout app I've tried so far
reviews.review_description: Brilliant workout tailored to your height, weight, age and goals, and it's fun. Highly recommend it.

I actually think this game is pretty good for exercise. 
The only reason I’m giving this 3 stars is because the majority of the time it takes me 10 minutes to get the game going due to the gloves floating in the air and not where my hands should be. I repeatedly turn off the headset and restart the app on the hope the gloves are on my hands. I purchased the whole game and i felt it was worth the money at the time, but for example today, I can’t get it going due to the gloves floating and I restated the game several times!
I PAID 100.00 FOR ANOTHER PROGRAM THAT DOESN'T MAKE ME HALF AS HAPPY AS THIS 19.00 PROGRAM GREAT WORK DEVELOPMENT TEAM

Absolutely brilliant, with more added content, this would fast become the go-to boxing/fitness rhythm game.  
I've been using it for a few days now and really liking it a lot.  
To the devs, please give us a mode that incorporates mixed reality so you can use a real suspended punch bag, utilising the app to highlight parts of the bag and with hand tracking so we can physically punch a bag and play. Just a thought. Thanks for a great app!!

P.S., those having trouble starting the exercises, pull arms apart wide, then do a clapping motion, no need to actually clap. The game will start. I hope that helps.
Can I ask the developers how do you keep your stats up to date?. Every time I use the app, it resets my personal workout plan.

It’s really good for workouts and it makes it very easy to burn a lot of calories while feeling less intense than a standard workout.￼￼￼ That said, ￼the problem with the mixed reality setting is that it does not offer the standard floating targets, and the fruit doesn’t tell you which hand to punch with.

Fun exercise game that has some nice features. The music is very good. Often these movement games have bad music but this game has very likeable music that keeps you focused and a couple of different tracks that are inoffensive and that don’t get annoying when looped. 
The squats are not too awful either. Most games force you to go lower than is comfortable and result in back and knee pain and make the experience bad. This game has it better where you can do a squat (not too many in succession) but don’t  have to duck low and so can decide what’s comfortable for you without having to go and adjust anything in a menu somewhere with calibration etc. Also the side-steps are not as damaging to the body as other games when doing dodges.  
The targets make it clear what angle to hit them at and have a futuristic look. Some impressive imagination has gone into the different backgrounds you can chose. It feels like good exercise and you can track calories burnt easily and see how work you have done over the week which makes me want to go back the next day and see how much I can do. It’s fun to see how many equivalent calories you burned next to everyday tasks which the game calculates   
I’m very pleased with the game. It serves as daily motivation and an excellent warm-up to more intense exercise. Usually people don’t warm up to do more intense VR games but this game would definitely be advisable to avoid injury ad I wish I’d known about this game sooner. Especially  since the music is all around enjoyable
I have also lost at least 12 pounds since playing and was amazed at how toned my legs and butt are you so I’m doing this game every day I can. I didn’t expect such amazing results. The fat burner routine in my favourite
Love the game! Perfect to keep the blood moving, and teaches real punching. Can’t make the block, however. No matter what I do, it is always a miss. Advice?
This game is a waste of money when I try to play the game I have to restart the game over and over because the screen doesn't play where I want it to play and it appears like someone against the wall

Good as a warmup or when you aren't feeling motivated to workout.  

Speed is still too slow on the highest mode (Hell mode) but is better if you do body squats while waiting for the next round of slow orbs to approach you.

And would be nice if more than one song played during a set.  I did a 20+ min workout and it was the same song on repeat over and over :(

If you can ignore the repeated song and fill up the slow durations with squats or other body movements, it is pretty fun and enjoyable to play, hence the 4 stars.

reviews.review_title: A lot of potential, needs some work.
reviews.review_description: This is a fun game, that said, it isn't much of a workout. The fundamentals are there, but on the hardest setting I cant break a sweat, barely better than a leisurely walk.  They could easily speed up the game, make it a mixed reality version where the screen is in front, so you can move more,  a quirk is when you duck it often says move backward with an arrow down. But I am exactly where I should be, so that would end you up multiple feet back by the end if you did it each time that showed up.  I think if they add two or three more levels above hard, maybe a 1.5 time and a 2.0 time maybe even a 2.5 time speed variation, that could help,  as it is the only one that is even remotely at a decent pace is muscle explosion on hard. And thats short (under 6 min) and still slow.   Endurance is a good length, (about 20 min) but slow, very slow, like I said barely gets me to zone 2 cardio, and half the time (I did a 45 minute session) I was not even getting to zone 1.  Overall, it is fun and has great potential, but for a workout, I would say powerbeats or golden gloves would be better options, les mills bodycombat also a contender, for those who are totally untrained, this may be a good starter before you move to more intense vr workouts.  But for a game called Fitness! They could turn it up, a lot.  Hopefully they will read this, they don't seem to be responding in discord, but if they do read this and add some speedier options and some more right left crossover combinations that would help.  And it would be great to have a mixed reality option so I could see the room and floor with the walkway straight ahead.
Liked until I paid now won't let me play.
Day 2 of the paid app and is not opening anymore! I will ask for a refund!
Trial worked perfect and when paid glitches
Love the game, amazing work out, but im on day 3 and iv had enough of the same music

developer_response.body:
We understand that hearing the same music can become repetitive, especially as you progress through your training. While we do include different tracks for various workout modes, we’re aware that variety is key to keeping the experience fresh and engaging.
Due to copyright restrictions, our selection of available music is somewhat limited, but we’re always exploring ways to enhance the audio experience!

reviews.review_description:
It amuses me and makes me sweat a lot! As other customers have already said, it could use a little more variety in the backgrounds (the realistic ones are too basic) and in the music, which is a bit repetitive. A problem perhaps only mine is that I often miss the "two fists" symbol, either standing still waiting for them or going towards them. Is there a solution? Leaderboard doesn't work any more.

Is there anybody out there? No more updates?

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thank you for your feedback on our game. We're glad to hear that you're enjoying it and that it's providing a good workout for you. We appreciate your suggestions regarding the game's backgrounds and music, and we'll take them into consideration as we continue to improve and update the game. 

Regarding the issue you mentioned about the "two fists" symbol, we're sorry that you're experiencing difficulty with this. We would like to know more about the problem to help us address it. Would you be able to tell us more about why you're missing the symbol? Is it too small or not prominent enough? We would appreciate your thoughts so we can work on a solution. We would be grateful if you could provide more information via our Discord (https://discord.com/invite/HX2DGCx6ra) or email (contact@vrsuplife.com) so we can address any problems. 

Thank you again for your support and feedback, and we hope to continue improving our game for you.

reviews.review_description: Absolutely immersive experience! The visuals are stunning, the music pumps you up, and the workout feels intence yet rewarding. Five stars all the way!

developer_response.body:
Hi AtomiicGamingAU,

Thank you for sharing your positive experience with us! We're delighted to hear that that you had an immersive experience with FITNESS. Keep up the fantastic work :)

reviews.review_description: I bought it immediately. Can update be added to add designs or music from artificial intelligence? I wish you succes

developer_response.body:
Hi ahmed0741, thank you for your excellent review and for your immediate support! Regarding your suggestion about adding designs or music from artificial intelligence - that's a very interesting and innovative idea. While we don't currently have this feature implemented, we're always exploring new ways to enhance the game experience.

To stay updated on our latest features and to share more of your thoughts, we invite you to join our Discord community (https://discord.gg/HX2DGCx6ra). It's a great place to connect with other players, discuss ideas, and get the latest news about the game.

Thank you again for your support! We look forward to potentially seeing you in our Discord!

reviews.review_title: I have paid 14.99 but it doesnt unlock..
reviews.review_description: Paid for it but not getting what i paid for.... very frustrating 😕
Great app, trains you while playing.  I can't find a single thing, is there a way to change the music?

developer_response.body:
Hi AnnieSoldier,

Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback and for bringing up the music within our app. The app is designed to offer different music tracks tailored to the type of workout you choose. For example, selecting an upper body workout will set a specific tune to motivate you, while choosing a lower body workout will change the music to match that activity's pace and intensity.

We understand how important a diverse music selection can be to enhance your workout experience. And we're actively working on expanding our music library to include a wider range of songs and genres. If you have any specific suggestions or further questions, please don't hesitate to get in touch. Let's keep the energy high and workouts fun with the perfect soundtrack!

Warmest Regards,
Suplife Games

reviews.review_description: It's good for light exercise, and it should be fun to add more music. Anyway, I think you can give it a try at this price and expect a better performance.

developer_response.body:
Hi erisii, thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on the game! Your comment about adding more music is well-noted. We're always looking to expand our music library to keep the experience fresh and engaging for our players. For more in-depth discussions about the game, sharing ideas for improvements, or connecting with other players, we invite you to join our Discord community (https://discord.gg/HX2DGCx6ra). It's a great place to stay updated on new features and updates as we continue to develop the game.
Thank you again for your review. Player feedback like yours is crucial in helping us make the game even better.

reviews.review_description:
IV had this for two days so far and I'm really enjoying the work out it gives you. My only suggestion will be a bigger music library and maybe some for sceneries. 

There are so many good songs that this would work to like drum and bass, techno, bass and more.

developer_response.body: Hi JONESY6DNINE, thank you for your feedback! We're delighted to hear that you're enjoying the workout our game provides. Your suggestion regarding expanding the music library and adding diverse sceneries is duly noted. We agree that more variety can enhance the overall experience, and we'll definitely consider incorporating a wider range of music genres and scenic options in future updates.

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely love this app,  pity we can't update our own music, as some of thr tunes are really snoozey. Plus I work out twice a day 20m sessions and the music is very repetitive.
Also the block often misses even though the gloves are up and I'm waiting for the symbol to hit them. Quite annoying when I'm on a roll.

developer_response.body:
Hi MoodyCow85, thank you for your fantastic feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you love the app overall. We appreciate your comments about the music, and your suggestion about allowing users to update their own music is interesting and we'll certainly consider this for future updates. Regarding the blocking issue you've mentioned, we're sorry to hear you're experiencing this frustration. This is valuable feedback that will help us improve the game mechanics. We'll look into this to ensure the blocking system is as responsive and accurate as possible. If you have any more detailed feedback or suggestions, we'd love to hear them. Our Discord community(https://discord.gg/HX2DGCx6ra) is a great place to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on any improvements or new features we implement based on player feedback.
Thank you again for taking the time to share your experience. Your input helps us make the game better for everyone!

reviews.review_description: I love it, very good workouts I have fun.

reviews.review_title: The game, not the same as show
reviews.review_description: The game play not the same as advertise. Very boring.

developer_response.body: Hi Ponpoj, thank you for sharing your thoughts with us. We're sorry to hear that your experience with the game didn't meet your expectations. Your feedback is valuable to us, and we'd love to learn more about your specific concerns to improve our game. Would you be willing to share more details with us through Discord (https://discord.gg/HX2DGCx6ra) or email (contact@!vrsuplife.com)? We're always striving to make our game better and appreciate any insights you can provide.
